$description: Avatar with Label - Combines an avatar with primary text (name) and optional secondary text (description)

$component.name: Avatar with Label
$component.description: A composite component that displays an avatar alongside text labels (name and optional email/description). Commonly used in user lists, dropdowns, and profile displays.
$component.structure: Horizontal layout: Avatar (left) + Text container (right) with name and optional description stacked vertically

sizes.sm: 32px avatar, 14px name text, 12px description - Compact size for lists and dropdowns
sizes.md: 40px avatar, 14px name text, 14px description - Standard size for most use cases
sizes.lg: 48px avatar, 16px name text, 16px description - Larger for emphasis or headers
sizes.xl: 56px avatar, 18px name text, 16px description - Extra large for prominent displays

variants.with-description: Shows both name and secondary text (email, role, etc.)
variants.name-only: Shows only the primary name text without description

usage.contexts: User selection menus, profile cards, comment headers, team member lists, activity feeds
usage.spacing: Avatar and text are separated by consistent gap based on size

container.$note: Main wrapper container - horizontal flex layout

direction.description: Avatar with label uses horizontal layout (avatar left, text right)

align-items.description: Vertical alignment of avatar and text container

sm.description: Gap between avatar and text for sm size - 4px

md.description: Gap between avatar and text for md size - 6px

lg.description: Gap between avatar and text for lg size - 8px

xl.description: Gap between avatar and text for xl size - 8px

avatar.$note: References the base avatar component - size matches the avatar-with-label size

sm.description: Avatar border radius for sm - full circle

md.description: Avatar border radius for md - full circle

lg.description: Avatar border radius for lg - full circle

xl.description: Avatar border radius for xl - full circle

text-container.$note: Wrapper for name and description text - vertical flex layout

direction.description: Text container uses vertical layout (name on top, description below)

sm.description: Gap between name and description for sm size - 0px

md.description: Gap between name and description for md size - 0px

lg.description: Gap between name and description for lg size - 0px

xl.description: Gap between name and description for xl size - 0px

name.$note: Primary text - user name or main label

sm.description: Name typography for sm size - 14px semibold

md.description: Name typography for md size - 14px semibold

lg.description: Name typography for lg size - 16px semibold

xl.description: Name typography for xl size - 18px semibold

sm.description: Name line height for sm size - 20px

md.description: Name line height for md size - 20px

lg.description: Name line height for lg size - 24px

xl.description: Name line height for xl size - 28px

description.$note: Secondary text - email, role, or additional information (optional)

sm.description: Description typography for sm size - 12px regular

md.description: Description typography for md size - 14px regular

lg.description: Description typography for lg size - 16px regular

xl.description: Description typography for xl size - 16px regular

sm.description: Description line height for sm size - 17px

md.description: Description line height for md size - 20px

lg.description: Description line height for lg size - 24px

xl.description: Description line height for xl size - 24px

static.description: ARIA role for non-interactive avatar with label

interactive.description: ARIA role when avatar with label is clickable

format.description: Format for ARIA label combining name and description
